verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We find joy in every moment, not because God is always good But because God has been so good to us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is greater, God is good Awesome in everything He do, God is faithful, God is love, lives in me and He lives in you…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're my strength, You're my hope You're my one desire We surrender all to you
